---
title: "Medical statistics"
author:
    - name: Roemer J. Janse
      orcid: 0000-0003-0059-872X
      email: R.J.Janse-5@umcutrecht.nl
      affiliations:
        - name: UMC Utrecht
format: revealjs
---

# Concerning probability

- What is probability
- Is probability real
- Stochastic vs. deterministic systems

# Viewing the world as a stochastic process
- Probability distributions
- Sampling to find your distribution
- Sufficient samples

# Thinking about probability

- Frequentism: one truth
- Bayesian: an updated truth

# Dealing with probability & uncertainty

- Frequentism
    - Confidence intervals
    - P functions/values
    - Bootstrapping
    
- Bayesian
    - Credibility intervals
    - Priors & posteriors
